subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Dawning-Place of Revelation and the Dayspring of Inspiration. This doth He Himself testify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الی هو و الذی ینطق انه لمطلع وحی و مشرق الهام یشهد بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
